---
title: "Appendix"
author: "Inayat Gill (36880817)"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
execute: 
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

### Please find below the AI queries related to the assignment

![Screenshot 1](images/screenshot_1.jpg)

![Screenshot 2](images/screenshot_2.jpg)

![Screenshot 3](images/screenshot_3.jpg)

![Screenshot 4](images/screenshot_4.jpg)
